jsonLd.title: RBI is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at RBI are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About RBI:
RBI is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBI!
